thesis: Crypto Fear & Greed contrarian timer — buy extreme fear, lighten extreme greed, strictly-lagged

rawDiagnostics.note: FNG is a lagged price transform; price Granger-leads sentiment; the contrarian SIGN is wrong (greed predicts HIGHER fwd ret, not lower).

devilsAdvocate_proCyclicalMomentumFNG.comment: OPPOSITE of the hypothesis (long only in greed). Best-signed FNG rule. Still fails the right null.
devilsAdvocate_proCyclicalMomentumFNG.interpretation: Best-of-grid AR(1) placebo (p95=1.207) matches the real signal (1.171); p=0.056>0.05. Sentiment content indistinguishable from persistent noise timing BTC drift.

mechanism: Coincident-beta trap, identical to D6-M1/M4/S5. FNG carries no exogenous predictive content beyond a lagged, persistent echo of price. A persistent random (AR(1)-matched) series times BTC's bull drift as well or better than the real index. The literal contrarian sign is additionally wrong (it fights momentum).
